$comment: JSON Schema for builds.json. Cross-field constraints that JSON Schema cannot express (default_rust must appear in rust_versions; rust_versions entries must be keys in rust_image_digests) are enforced by scripts/validate-json.sh.

image_digest.description: OCI image digest, including the algorithm prefix.

rust_version.description: Rust toolchain version in the form major.minor.patch.

rust_image_digests.description: Map from rust toolchain version to the pinned multi-arch index digest of rust:<version>-slim-bookworm.

stellar_cli_versions.description: Each stellar-cli release we publish images for, with its explicit rust pairings.

default_rust.description: Rust version used by the :<cli> tag alias (and, for the newest entry, :latest). Must also appear in rust_versions.

ref.description: Upstream stellar/stellar-cli git commit SHA for this release. Source of truth; version is metadata.

rust_versions.description: Explicit list of rust versions this stellar-cli release was built with at publish time.

variants.description: Bespoke (stellar-cli, rust) combinations published under prefixed tags (e.g. :l0-...). Fully specified; do not participate in :<cli> or :latest aliases.

cli_ref.description: stellar/stellar-cli commit SHA this variant is built from.

cli_version.description: stellar-cli version label for this variant. Goes into tags and labels.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of why this variant exists.

labels.description: Extra OCI labels merged on top of the defaults for this variant.

name.description: Short identifier used as the tag prefix, e.g. l0.

rust_version.description: Pinned rust toolchain for this variant. Must be a key in rust_image_digests.

tags.description: Optional extra tag aliases for this variant, in addition to the canonical :<name>-<cli>-rust<rust> form.

title: stellar-cli-docker builds.json
